# getascraper/how-to-scrape-cashify

> Cashify Scraper is an Apify Actor that extracts used device resale and buyback prices from Cashify India. Free tier available.

## Overview
- Cashify India scraper and used device resale price data extraction API
- Extracts: resale price, storage variants, repair cost, image links
- Output formats: JSON, CSV, Excel, XML, RSS
- Free tier: included

## Key Pages
- README: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-cashify/blob/main/README.md
- Apify Store: https://apify.com/getascraper/cashify-scraper
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~cashify-scraper
- Source Actor: https://github.com/getascraper/actorstack/tree/main/actors/cashify-scraper

## How it works
1. Enter a device brand, category, and target Indian city or pincode
2. The actor collects matching resale and buyback listings from Cashify India
3. Results are written as flat records ready for export

## Target site characteristics
- Publicly listed used device resale and buyback quotes for mobiles, laptops, tablets, and smartwatches
- Coverage across major device brands sold in India
- City-specific pricing for Delhi and Gurgaon, national baseline elsewhere

## API Usage
- Node.js SDK: https://docs.apify.com/api/client/js
- REST API: https://docs.apify.com/api/v2
- MCP server: https://github.com/apify/apify-mcp-server

## Supported target URLs
- https://www.cashify.in/sell-old-mobile-phone/*
- https://www.cashify.in/sell-old-laptop/*

## Pricing
- Free tier: included, first 50 results of every run
- Paid: $1.99 per 1,000 results

## Output schema (highlights)
- price: maximum resale or buyback price in Indian rupees
- price_min_inr: minimum resale price in Indian rupees
- repair_price_inr: estimated screen repair cost
- variants: per-variant storage prices

## Use cases
- Phone reseller checking daily buyback floor prices before quoting customers
- Trade-in business comparing offers against Cashify across storage variants
- Price comparison site displaying fresh Indian resale values
- Market researcher tracking used-device price trends across brands and cities

## Support
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-cashify/issues
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~cashify-scraper/issues
